title: Cystopus montanus
intro: There is not enough information about the plant Cystopus montanus.
taxonomy: Cystopus montanus belongs to the family of flowering plants known as the Orobanchaceae. This family is a group of parasitic plants that obtain their nutrients by connecting to the roots of other plants. As a member of the Orobanchaceae family, Cystopus montanus is classified under the genus Cystopus, which is a small group of flowering plants. The classification of Cystopus montanus also includes its species designation, montanus, which refers to its mountainous habitat. The full classification of Cystopus montanus is therefore Cystopus montanus (Orobanchaceae).
